title: The 'O Antiphons' (data/texts/oAntiphons.json)
description: The Advent antiphons attached to the Magnificat at Vespers on the days leading up to Christmas, keyed by day-of-December (as a string). This app follows the Sarum/English tradition of 8 antiphons (Dec 16-23, adding 'O Virgo virginum' on Dec 23) rather than the Roman tradition's 7 (Dec 17-23) - see SOURCES.md and CONVENTIONS.md.
